scripts.sync:skill: for d in skills/*/; do name=$(basename "$d"); mkdir -p ".agents/skills/$name" && cp -r "$d". ".agents/skills/$name/"; done
scripts.sync:scripts: mkdir -p skills/generate-ui/scripts && rsync -a packages/app/dist/. skills/generate-ui/scripts/ && cp packages/cli/dist/cli.cjs skills/generate-ui/scripts/cli.cjs
scripts.package:skill: pnpm build && pnpm sync:scripts && pnpm --filter app generate:refs && pnpm sync:skill
